While it mentions the Crescent Bay Municipal Pension Fund having approximately $310 million in AUM and references financial harm to clients, it never states or calculates the specific figures of $8,238,000 (cherry-picking), $291,400 (excess commissions), $92,600 (undisclosed compensation), or the combined total of approximately $8.622 million. The financial harm section explicitly leaves the loss amount blank ('suffered a loss of as a result of WCA's cherry-picking pattern'), indicating the agent failed to extract or calculate this key figure.

criteria_results.title: Hargrove & Tilton Review: Failure to Test Trade Allocation Noted
criteria_results.reasoning: The agent's output mentions Hargrove & Tilton's compliance review multiple times (referencing it in the context of books and records, code of ethics, policy reviews, etc.), but never specifically notes that the H&T annual compliance review (dated December 8, 2023) failed to test trade allocation patterns despite WCA's heavy reliance on omnibus trading. The criterion requires the output to identify this specific omission as relevant evidence of WCA's deficient compliance infrastructure. The agent's references to H&T are general and do not highlight this particular gap.

criteria_results.title: Key Dates: Examination Timeline Accurately Stated
criteria_results.reasoning: The agent's output only explicitly states two of the five required dates: the examination period 'from March 11, 2024 to August 2, 2024' and the referral to the Enforcement Division 'on October 18, 2024.' The referral notice date of November 6, 2024, and the service date of November 12, 2024, are not mentioned anywhere in the output. Additionally, the output characterizes August 2, 2024 as the end of the examination period rather than the date the deficiency letter was issued, which may be an inaccuracy. With only two or possibly three dates present (and one potentially mislabeled), the criterion requiring at least three correctly stated dates is not clearly met.

criteria_results.title: Whitmore's 12% LP Interest Value Correctly Stated
criteria_results.reasoning: The agent's output mentions Whitmore's 12% limited partnership interest in Oceanic Fund I LP and references the $185M fund value (from wca-form-adv-part2a-march2023.docx), but never calculates or states the approximate $22.2 million value (12% × $185M). The output only states the 12% interest and separately references $185 as a key figure, without combining them to produce the $22.2 million valuation required by the criterion.

criteria_results.title: Compliance Manual Last Updated November 15, 2022
criteria_results.reasoning: The agent's output does not mention the specific date 'November 15, 2022' as the last update date for WCA's Compliance Manual. While the output references the Compliance Manual multiple times and notes it was reviewed by Hargrove & Tilton, it never specifies that the manual was last updated on November 15, 2022.

criteria_results.title: Lakeshore Trading LLC: Ostrowski's 40% Ownership Stated
criteria_results.reasoning: The agent's output mentions Lakeshore Trading LLC and Kevin Ostrowski (in the key figures section referencing bank records), but never states that Ostrowski owns 40% of Lakeshore Trading LLC. The ownership percentage and the ownership relationship between Ostrowski and Lakeshore Trading LLC are not identified anywhere in the output.

criteria_results.title: Lakeshore Trading LLC: Ostrowski-Bellini Personal Relationship and Undisclosed Nature
criteria_results.reasoning: The agent's output does not identify the personal relationship between Ostrowski and Bellini as college roommates, nor does it mention that this relationship was undisclosed. While the output references Bellini receiving undisclosed personal compensation in connection with the directed brokerage arrangement with Lakeshore Trading LLC, and mentions Ostrowski in the context of bank records, it never identifies the college roommate relationship between the two individuals or flags that this personal relationship was undisclosed to clients.

criteria_results.title: Email Exhibit Language Quoted or Paraphrased
criteria_results.reasoning: The agent's output does not reference the Whitmore-to-Delgado email (whitmore-delgado-email.eml) at all, nor does it mention the ambiguous language 'clean up the shared drive' or 'clean up of legacy files on the shared drive.' While the output discusses Whitmore's instruction to delete trade allocation records, it does not cite or paraphrase the specific email exhibit or note its potentially innocent interpretation.
